title: Biceps Tendon Tear at the Elbow
license_notes: Use as source support only. Avoid verbatim copying from AAOS copyrighted patient education.
supports: Distal biceps tendon tears are often caused by sudden injury and can produce bruising, swelling, a pop, and weakness with elbow bending or forearm twisting.
X-rays do not show the biceps tendon but can help rule out other causes of elbow pain.
Distal biceps tendon concern requires separate orthopedic evaluation and should block simple overuse elbow discharge output.
